loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing current THD (I-THD) — voltage THD, per-order harmonics (H5/H7), and waveform quality (crest/flicker) are not measured or have no data on this asset.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing current THD trends — voltage THD and specific harmonic orders (5th/7th) are not measured by this asset.
